title: Software Engineer - Backend
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of backend experience far exceed the 2+ years requirement, and your Go expertise matches the stated preference for Java, Scala, C++, or Go. Your distributed systems background aligns with the role's SaaS and infrastructure focus. Amsterdam is within your acceptable European regions with reasonable proximity to Berlin. However, this is a mid-level Software Engineer position emphasizing foundational work and learning, representing a notable step down from your current senior-level role with multi-team impact and system design ownership at Velox. The posting does not explicitly state remote eligibility; Amsterdam location creates geographic ambiguity about hybrid/on-site expectations. Databricks is a strong brand company, and the high-scale systems work (pricing infrastructure, millions of cluster-hours) appeals to your growth direction, but the seniority mismatch is a material concern for a candidate at your level.

red_flags: Mid-level position with foundational/learning scope; you are senior-level with architecture ownership
Location is Amsterdam (Netherlands), not Berlin—hybrid/remote status unclear
2+ years required experience; role positioning suggests entry-mid range despite your 7 years
Emphasizes learning and guidance from more senior members, not peer or leadership role
